message:
refactor(cli): extract announceAssignWatchOverlay and add comprehensive tests

Extract the overlay hint/warning logging from runWatchMode() into a
dedicated announceAssignWatchOverlay() function with nil-safe logf
handling. This separates the announcement logic from the watch loop,
making it independently testable.

Tests (assign_pure_test.go):
- TestAnnounceAssignWatchOverlay_SkipsEmptyPreparation: verifies no
  logs emitted for zero-value preparation
- TestAnnounceAssignWatchOverlay_LogsPreparedHintAndWarning: table-driven
  tests for hint-only, warning-only, and warning+hint combinations
- TestAnnounceAssignWatchOverlay_WithPreparedScenarios: integration tests
  that pipe real prepareAssignWatchOverlay() output through announce,
  covering outside-tmux, existing-binding, installs-binding, and
  binding-failure scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
